positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed circular crest featuring entwined bioluminescent flora and celestial fauna. The main elements include stylized cosmic mandalas, blooming neon-colored lotus flowers, and ethereal, tribal-style winged creatures. The style should blend neo-traditional tattoo art with intricate Art Nouveau geometry. Utilize a deep indigo and vibrant gold color palette against a muted, textured background. The composition must feature strong, clean silhouettes, crisp linework, and high contrast suitable for direct apparel printing. Ideal for a central, badge-like placement.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, signature, watermark, logo, trademark, distorted, cropped, monochrome, simple
